title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RBmAP2nD, mAP
description: The mAP (micro Access Point) is a tiny size wireless 2.4GHz Access Point with full RouterOS capabilities. It is very portable, since it accepts power from a wide variety of sources - USB, Passive PoE and power jack. It also works as a PoE injector - the second Ethernet port provides up to 500mA of power to another device, for example, you can connect a SXT CPE device to it
